name: Orbit Salvager
description: add tutorial onboarding flow and progress guidance. improved draft and reroll copy clarity. overlay and Enter-key interaction polish for pause/idle/over states

items: add tutorial onboarding flow and progress guidance
improved draft and reroll copy clarity
overlay and Enter-key interaction polish for pause/idle/over states
Improved draft choice UX with cleaner reroll and token messaging.
Adjusted Enter key handling so overlay actions and pause resume behave more predictably.
Improved overlay scrolling behavior for smaller displays and constrained viewports.
Promoted Orbit Salvager from a browser prototype to a standalone native Tauri desktop app.
Added sector objectives, combo progression, Sweeper hazard variants, and temporary boost modes.
Shipped launcher-ready archive packaging, public manifest metadata, and placeholder media bays for future GLB and video content.
Refined the desktop HUD with a cinematic briefing drawer, pause flow, and stronger Tauri-ready presentation.
Introduced the Rift Leviathan boss sector with telegraphed lane strikes, pulse-hit windows, and a real signature encounter.
Added a persistent Hangar Deck with salvage credits, unlockable rigs, and loadout-based run identities.
Introduced the Signal Eclipse event sector with blackout waves, safe-lane reads, and Anchor-Shard recovery.
Added a procedural audio director and cinematic sector stingers so encounters feel distinctly different even without final media assets.
Introduced mid-run draft choices between sectors, turning Orbit Salvager runs into real build-making decisions instead of flat repeats.
Expanded drafts with rare prototypes, legendary overclocks, and reroll tokens so high-roll runs can branch into much stronger identities.
